name: Dark Spirit of Malice
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>怨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>念</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ねん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>邪悪霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ダーク・スピリット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY, then target 1 Level 8 Fiend monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but its effects are negated. If a Level 8 Fiend monster(s) is sent to your GY while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Dark Spirit of Malice" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY, then target 1 Level 8 Fiend monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but its effects are negated. If a Level 8 Fiend monster(s) is sent to your GY while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Dark Spirit of Malice" once per turn.
eff: When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY, then target 1 Level 8 Fiend monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but its effects are negated. If a Level 8 Fiend monster(s) is sent to your GY while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Dark Spirit of Malice" once per turn.

action: Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
